resources.string: Select the app you want to open. You can set it as default to open automatically next time.
Enjoy the freedom to listen to music links (Spotify, YouTube, etc.) sent by friends in your own preferred music platform.
When you click or share a link, MusicLink intercepts it and finds the song on all other platforms (YouTube Music, Apple, Deezer, etc.) in seconds.
If you set your favorite app as \'Default\' from the list before opening the music, you will be redirected directly to it on your next click.
You can make a platform default from the list screen to see it here.
You can grant the \'Open supported links\' permission to open music links automatically with MusicLink.
API call failed with code %1$d. The service might not have found the song.
